hero.subtext: We automate repetitive tasks — customer support, lead capture, follow-ups — so you can focus on what matters.

problem.label: The problem
problem.intro: Every day you waste time on things a machine can do better.

items.text: You answer the same questions a hundred times a week. By phone, by text, by Messenger.
Potential clients write at 11pm. Nobody answers. By morning they've contacted your competitor.
Follow-ups after meetings? Reminders? Quotes? You do them manually — or not at all.

services.label: Packages
services.title: Three things that work for you.
services.subtitle: Choose what eats most of your time — we'll handle the rest.

items.name: AutoReply
items.description: A client writes at 11pm asking about your prices. The bot replies in 10 seconds. You find out in the morning. Zero missed enquiries.

items.name: AutoLeads
items.description: Someone fills in a form on your website — you get an SMS with their details within 60 seconds. No lead slips through.

items.name: AutoAssistant
items.description: The phone rings while you're under a car or with a patient. The bot answers, handles questions, and books the appointment. Like having a receptionist — 10x cheaper.

howItWorks.label: Process
howItWorks.title: Three steps to a working system.

steps.name: Conversation
steps.description: A 15-minute call — you tell us what's eating your time, we assess what can be automated.

steps.name: Configuration
steps.description: We configure everything. You don't touch any code. Delivered in 7–14 days.

steps.name: It works
steps.description: The system works 24/7. You see results. We handle maintenance and updates.

items.quote: I used to spend 2 hours a day answering the same questions about pricing and availability. Now the bot does it for me. Clients don't even know it's not me.
items.author: Auto repair shop owner

items.quote: I had a problem losing leads on weekends. Since AutoLeads, every contact lands in my CRM automatically and I get an SMS when someone fills out the form.
items.author: Beauty salon owner

items.quote: I didn't think this was for me — but setup took a week and results were immediate. I recommend it to anyone who wastes time on repetitive tasks.
items.author: Construction company owner

cta.headline: Ready to stop answering the same questions?
cta.subtext: One conversation. No obligations. Find out what we can automate in your business.

footer.tagline: Automation for small and medium businesses.
